title: Mixed Folder PDF Mini Fixture
capture_note: Checked-in source-native folder probe for Story 222. It mirrors the bounded four-member ZIP PDF probe from Story 221 without a ZIP wrapper so the maintained lane can prove direct-folder PDF-member recommendation parity while keeping relative member provenance, existing `.eml` and HTML launches, and explicit blocked routing for the unsupported `.txt` member.

members.notes: This member is intentionally limited to the maintained recommendation-only intake seam inside mixed-folder routing. The route row should point to the emitted intake plan artifact rather than auto-launching the final recommended PDF recipe.
This unsupported text member exists to prove explicit blocked routing on the bounded mixed-folder PDF-member slice.

supported_scope: relative member manifest and route rows
member-local recommendation-only intake for one repo-owned born-digital PDF member
suffix-based routing into existing maintained direct-entry recipes for the `.eml` and HTML members
explicit blocked rows for unsupported members
known_gaps: No scanned or handwritten direct-folder PDF-member recommendation proof
No archive-contained approved handoff or final maintained PDF recipe launch
No nested archives or attachment extraction
No broad mixed-folder normalization into a single combined bundle
